options.name: -gstack_duration
options.description: -gstack_duration <seconds>, Time duration in seconds for which we want gstack to be logged. (Default: End of the Program !)

options.name: -gstack_interval
options.description: -gstack_interval <seconds>, Time interval in seconds between repeated gstack logs during the gstack duration. (Default: 60)

options.name: -gstack_start
options.description: -gstack_start <seconds>, Time in seconds after which the gstack is started to be logged. (Default: 60)

options.name: -overwrite
options.description: Overwrite the log file if it already exists
